pr.title: RHAIENG-5005: No unit tests for ci/cached-builds/gen_gha_matrix_jobs.py
pr.body:
Extract filter_rhel_images(), assign_platforms(), and build_matrix_output()
from main() into standalone functions so they can be tested independently.
Add 36 unit tests covering matrix generation, platform filtering
(ARM64, PPC64LE, S390X), RHEL image filtering, edge cases (empty inputs),
and end-to-end pipeline scenarios.

Closes [RHAIENG-5005](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHAIENG-5005)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Jiri Danek <jdanek@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Refactor**
  * Reorganized CI build-matrix generation into discrete steps; adjusted platform-inclusion rules (PPC64LE inclusion logic changed) while preserving matrix structure and subscription behavior.
* **Tests**
  * Added comprehensive unit tests covering target extraction/parsing, RHEL filtering rules, platform-assignment permutations, matrix output formatting (compact JSON / has_jobs behavior), end-to-end matrix generation, and compatibility sanity checks.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
